multiple_choice.description: Single correct answer from 4-5 options. Score is binary: 1 for correct, 0 for incorrect.
multiple_choice.example_prompt_suffix: Choose the best answer from the options below.

open_ended.description: Free-form response evaluated on multiple quality dimensions. Requires LLM-as-judge or human review.

code_generation.description: Code evaluated by executing against hidden test cases. Primary metric is pass@1.
code_generation.example_prompt_suffix: Write a function that solves the following problem.

mathematical_proof.description: Mathematical proofs require expert review for logical validity. Automated checking limited to final numerical answers.
mathematical_proof.example_prompt_suffix: Prove the following statement. Show all steps.

creative_writing.description: Subjective evaluation of creative output. High inter-rater variability expected.
creative_writing.example_prompt_suffix: Write a creative piece based on the following prompt.

logical_reasoning.description: Problems with deterministic correct answers. Chain-of-thought can be optionally evaluated.
logical_reasoning.example_prompt_suffix: Solve the following logic problem. Provide your answer and reasoning.

fact_retrieval.description: Factual questions with verifiable answers. Scored by token-level F1 against reference answer.
fact_retrieval.example_prompt_suffix: Answer the following factual question concisely.

multi_turn_dialogue.description: Multi-turn conversations evaluated for consistency and quality across turns. Requires stateful evaluation.
